mnemonics: MONITOR - Maintains Operational Norms Internally Running Outside Notified
USER - Understand System Elements Revealing Operations Naturally
keyPoints: 6.1: Types of Operating Systems (Single-user, Multi-user, Multi-tasking)
6.2: Characteristics of Operating Systems (Efficiency, Reliability, Flexibility)
6.4: Operating System Process Model (Blocking and Non-Blocking I/O)
6.5: CPU Scheduling Algorithms (FCFS, SJF, Priority Scheduling)
